query: SELECT id, messageId, sessionId, messageType, mediaUrl, media_mime_type, media_file_name, LEFT(content, 100) as content_preview FROM messages WHERE media_file_name LIKE '%branca%' OR content LIKE '%branca%' LIMIT 5
